title: Roofer

rationales.taskAutomation: Tear-off, deck repair and shingle/membrane installation are physical work at height with no automatable substitute; drone-based inspection reports are the main automatable slice.
rationales.toolMaturity: Drone and AI-assisted roof-inspection imaging tools are credible and gaining traction for estimating, but not for the install itself.
rationales.adoption: A minority of larger roofing companies use drone/AI inspection tools for estimating; most crews still measure and inspect manually.
rationales.agenticExposure: An agent can process a drone image into a measurement report; it cannot tear off a roof or seal a membrane.

tasksAtRisk: Drone-based roof measurement and damage assessment
Estimate and proposal generation from inspection imagery
Material ordering based on measured square footage
tasksGrowing: Tear-off, decking repair and installation at height
Reading and adapting to structural surprises found mid-tear-off
salarySource: BLS OES May 2023, SOC 47-2181, p25-p75 rounded

defenseSkills.skill: Drone/AI roof-inspection and measurement software fluency

insight: Roofing stays low-risk because the physical work at height has no substitute, though drone-based inspection and AI measurement tools are starting to automate the estimating step for larger companies.
